metadata.plotlines:note: A base-less parchment style for previewing a book where the OpenFreeMap tiles can't be reached (e.g. a sandboxed preview with no external network). It has no external tile source, so MapLibre's 'load' event fires at once and the book's pins, routes and story render on a plain background. Switched on with ?base=blank; the shipped default (styles/victorian.json) is unchanged. Glyphs are still pointed at OpenFreeMap and load lazily, so text labels appear only when that host is reachable — pin positions, route lines and the story pane do not depend on them.
